# Changelog

All **notable** changes to ARTwarp-py will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.1/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

*Note: These messages are auto-generated by an LLM because I can't be bothered to edit
the CHANGELOG every time*

## [1.1.0] - 2026-03/04

### Added

- **OCEANS integration** (`artwarp.oceans` subpackage) — fetch real dolphin call data
  directly from the OCEANS API (Odontocete Call Environment and Archival Network,
  developed by James Sullivan: https://github.com/dolphin-acoustics-vip/database-management-system)
  into the artwarp-py training pipeline.
  - `artwarp.oceans.auth` — secure credential management via environment variables;
    supports `OCEAN_ACCESS_TOKEN`, `OCEAN_USERNAME`, `OCEAN_PASSWORD`, and
    `OCEAN_BASE_URL`; interactive prompt fallback for TTY sessions.
  - `artwarp.oceans.api` — `OceansClient` REST client with lazy auth, automatic
    one-shot token refresh on 401, and streaming WAV/PNG downloads. Covers all
    confirmed API endpoints: `/auth/login/`, `/metadata/encounters/`,
    `/metadata/recordings/`, `/metadata/selections/`, `/filespace/file/`,
    `/filespace/spectrogram/`.
  - `artwarp.oceans.contours` — `fetch_contours_to_dir` end-to-end pipeline
    (OCEANS → WAV bytes → scipy spectrogram → peak-frequency contour → CSV);
    `count_available_selections` for dry-run estimation.
  - `artwarp-py oceans fetch` / `artwarp-py oceans count` CLI subcommands.
  - `oceans.sh` — dedicated interactive Bash launcher for the OCEANS pipeline.
  - `run.sh` updated with option 5 (OCEANS Fetch) in the main menu.
  - 50 unit tests covering auth, API client, contour extraction, and CLI (all
    offline / mocked, no real network calls).
  - `docs/user/OCEANS.md` — end-user guide with quick start, full API reference,
    CLI reference, and troubleshooting.
  - `docs/dev/OCEANS_DEV.md` — internal developer notes: endpoint schema, auth
    design, contour-extraction algorithm, optional-dependency strategy, testing
    approach, known limitations, and extension guide.
  - `docs/user/QUICK_REFERENCE.md` — OCEANS section added.
  - `pyproject.toml` — `oceans = ["requests>=2.25.0"]` optional extra.
  - `requests` is an optional dependency (not required for core artwarp-py).

## [1.0.1_3] - 2026-03

### Added

- CHANGELOG entries for 1.0.1 and version set to 1.0.1 in setup.
- Humanised inline comments and `@author` in module docstrings.
- Visualization guide (plotting documentation).
- README banner and documentation links.

### Changed

- Linter and formatting polish (Black, isort, Flake8, Mypy).
- README layout and formatting.

## [1.0.1_2] - 2026-02-11

### Added

- GitHub Actions CI: pytest matrix (Python 3.9–3.12), coverage gate (80%), Black, Flake8.
- Documentation: docs -> README, INSTALLATION, QUICK_REFERENCE; architecture overview and API reference; docs for environment setup and performance; project summary and test results; simple and visualization examples.

## [1.0.1_1] - 2026-02

### Added

- Unit tests for DTW, ART, network, and validation.
- Loader tests, MATLAB compatibility tests, and visualization tests.

## [1.0.1_0] - 2026-01

### Added

- Initial package layout, pyproject and dependencies for ARTwarp port.
- DTW: similarity matrix and warp with Itakura constraints (Python fallback).
- ART: activate/match/sort/resonance, weight init/update/get_contour.
- ARTwarp network class and fit loop with convergence and sample shuffle.
- Contour/parameter validation and `resample_contours` for temporal-resolution alignment.
- IO: `load_contours`, load .ctr/.csv/.txt, directory auto-detect.
- IO: export results to pkl, reference contours and category assignments to CSV.
- CLI: argparse for train, predict, export, plot with resample options.
- Plotting: training summary, reference contours, convergence and match plots, results report.

---

## Original MATLAB implementation

This is a complete rewrite of ARTwarp, originally developed in MATLAB.
For the original MATLAB implementation history, see:
https://github.com/dolphin-acoustics-vip/artwarp

---
